symptom_text: I slide the switch but no light comes out at all
Just put in fresh Duracell batteries and it's still pitch black
The light flashes like a strobe and hurts my eyes
It used to be blinding but now it barely lights up the ground
The rubber button on the back has zero resistance
Button is sunken in and won't bounce back
I set it on the table and it turns off, pick it up and it works
Keeps cutting out, I have to smack the side to fix it
Plugged the USB in but the charging light remains off
Left it charging all day but it still won't turn on
Set it on the base and clicked the switch, dead silence
The light is broken and the water doesn't get warm
The switch pops up before I even hear the water boiling
It stops heating when the water is barely warm to the touch
Water is constantly pooling out from under the kettle
I noticed drops coming out right next to the plastic water gauge

gold_fault_category: Indicator on but won't stop boiling
symptom_text: Water is splashing out everywhere and it's still furiously boiling

gold_fault_category: Indicator on but won't stop boiling
symptom_text: Water is completely boiled but the switch never popped up
I forgot to add water and turned it on, and it just kept heating an empty pot
It doesn't protect itself when empty, it heated until I smelled smoke
The boiled water tastes like melting plastic
There's a thick crust of white stuff at the bottom
I can feel gritty pieces in my mouth when I drink the water
No matter how much I press the power button, it won't wake up
Plug is fine, but the machine screen is dark and won't start
Espresso is dripping out incredibly slowly
The basket seems clogged, I hear the pump but no liquid
Water is spraying out sideways from the brew head
I randomly found a huge puddle under the machine
The extracted espresso isn't hot at all, just lukewarm
The steam wand for frothing milk doesn't get as hot as it used to
Tank is full but the pump is just screaming and pulling zero water
Machine sounds like a jackhammer but no espresso is coming out
That descale warning icon just won't stop flashing red
Screen keeps forcing me to clean the scale and won't let me brew
Outlet is fine but the fan is completely dead and won't spin
No matter which speed dial I turn, there is no wind and no power
It's on setting 3 but turning so slow like it has no energy
I have to physically push the blade to get it to slowly start moving
The motor area emits a really sharp squeaking friction noise
Sounds like there's sand grinding inside it when it spins
Pushed the swing button but it just stares straight ahead
Swing gets stuck halfway and makes a loud clicking gear noise
Turn it on and the motor buzzes angrily but the blades are frozen
The axle is totally stuck, it makes an electrical sound and gets hot but won't turn
The mechanical speed buttons feel blocked and won't press down
The button to change speed is pressed in and won't pop out
Multiple keys got stuck down at the same time
The moment I turn it on the whole base vibrates like it's going to break apart
The blades look super unstable and wobbly when spinning
